hooks.command: json=$(cat); f=$(echo "$json" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); [[ "$f" == *.py ]] && /home/mtristan/miniconda3/envs/multivariate_ICL/bin/ruff format "$f" && /home/mtristan/miniconda3/envs/multivariate_ICL/bin/ruff check --fix --select I "$f" 2>/dev/null || true
